name: Bananas in Filo Nests
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Grand Marnier liqueur or rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add sugar, liqueur or rum, orange juice, and grated orange zest to the melted butter.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil. Continue boiling over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until it thickens.
4. Cut bananas into 1/4-inch slices.
5. Add the banana slices to the mixture and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
6. Place each Filo Nest on a dessert plate.
7. Spoon the cooked banana mixture into the center of each Filo Nest.
8. Drizzle hot orange syrup over the filo nests.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
10. Serve immediately, optionally topped with whipped topping.
Each serving contains about: 360 calories; 181 milligrams sodium; 8 milligrams cholesterol; 5 grams fat; 76 grams carbohydrates; 6 grams protein; 0.63 grams fiber.
